summary: Frontend testing completed for Dashboard history/leaderboard bug fix. BUG FIX VERIFIED: Dashboard now shows 'Saved Analyses' section and 'All-Time Leaderboard' widget on initial load. Found and FIXED a secondary bug where clicking saved analysis cards was failing due to using wrong field name (snap._id instead of snap.snapshot_id).
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: App.js line 690-691 now fetches history and leaderboard on dashboard load - working correctly
BUG FIX 2 VERIFIED: DashboardView.js lines 59-95 - 'Saved Analyses' section with data-testid='dashboard-saved-analyses' displays correctly with 14 saved sessions
BUG FIX 3 VERIFIED: DashboardView.js lines 216-253 - 'All-Time Leaderboard' widget with data-testid='dashboard-leaderboard-widget' displays correctly with 207 models
SECONDARY BUG FIXED: DashboardView.js line 77 was using snap._id but API returns snapshot_id - changed to snap.snapshot_id || snap._id for backward compatibility
Individual saved analysis cards (data-testid='saved-analysis-0' through 'saved-analysis-4') are clickable and show dataset name, date, and algorithm
Leaderboard entries (data-testid='lb-widget-0' through 'lb-widget-4') display correctly with algorithm name, dataset name, and score
seed_data_creation: None - used existing saved analyses and leaderboard data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard bug fix verified. On login, dashboard now shows: (1) 'Saved Analyses' section with clickable cards for previous sessions, (2) 'All-Time Leaderboard' widget showing top models across sessions. Fixed secondary bug where clicking saved analysis cards was calling API with 'undefined' - now uses correct snapshot_id field. User has 14 saved analysis sessions and 207 models in leaderboard.

BUG_FIX_1_SAVED_ANALYSES_ON_DASHBOARD.description: Saved Analyses section shows on dashboard load with clickable cards for previous sessions
BUG_FIX_1_SAVED_ANALYSES_ON_DASHBOARD.verified_behavior: Shows '14 saved analysis sessions — click to resume' with cards showing dataset name, date, and algorithm

BUG_FIX_2_LEADERBOARD_ON_DASHBOARD.description: All-Time Leaderboard widget shows on dashboard load with top models
BUG_FIX_2_LEADERBOARD_ON_DASHBOARD.verified_behavior: Shows '207 models across sessions' with top 5 entries showing algorithm, dataset, and score (Ridge Regression 97.5%, etc.)

BUG_FIX_3_CLICK_SAVED_ANALYSIS.description: Clicking on a saved analysis card loads the snapshot and restores analysis state
BUG_FIX_3_CLICK_SAVED_ANALYSIS.verified_behavior: After fix, clicking card loads snapshot with full dashboard (stat cards, charts, business interpretation, model leaderboard)
BUG_FIX_3_CLICK_SAVED_ANALYSIS.fix_applied: Changed snap._id to snap.snapshot_id || snap._id to match API response field name

REGRESSION_DASHBOARD_AFTER_TRAINING.status: PARTIAL - Not fully tested due to navigation issues
REGRESSION_DASHBOARD_AFTER_TRAINING.description: After training a model and returning to Dashboard, full dashboard should display
REGRESSION_DASHBOARD_AFTER_TRAINING.note: Dashboard with loaded snapshot shows all expected elements (stat cards, charts, tables)

saved_analyses_section.description: Saved Analyses section visible on dashboard with correct data-testid

leaderboard_widget.description: All-Time Leaderboard widget visible on dashboard with correct data-testid

snapshot_loading.description: Clicking saved analysis card loads snapshot correctly

rca_of_the_issue.original_bug: Dashboard didn't show history/leaderboard data on initial load - only after analyzing a dataset
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: App.js was only fetching history on 'history' view, not on 'dashboard' view
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied_by_main_agent: App.js line 690-691 now fetches history and leaderboard when activeView is 'dashboard' or 'history'/'leaderboard'
rca_of_the_issue.secondary_bug_found: DashboardView.js was using snap._id but API returns snapshot_id field
rca_of_the_issue.secondary_fix_applied_by_testing_agent: Changed line 77 from snap._id to snap.snapshot_id || snap._id
